apps.name: Noir
apps.subtitle: Modular media player
apps.localizedDescription: Noir modular media player with external services.
apps.versionDescription: Fix Miruro startup/replay failures by adding explicit local proxy readiness handshake, waiting for listener readiness before serving, and removing unsafe warm-up fallback that caused NSURLError -1004 black-screen attempts.

versions.localizedDescription: Fix Miruro startup/replay failures by adding explicit local proxy readiness handshake, waiting for listener readiness before serving, and removing unsafe warm-up fallback that caused NSURLError -1004 black-screen attempts.
